name: Derk, Longing for the Blue Skies
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蒼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>穹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>を<ruby lang="jp"><rb>睨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>めるダーク
name_jp_tl: Dark, Staring at the Blue Skies
desc: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck by your opponent's activated monster effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. When a monster effect is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s) (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 card from your hand or field; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that monster. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can return 1 of your other banished monsters to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Derk, Longing for the Blue Skies" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck by your opponent's activated monster effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. When a monster effect is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s) (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 card from your hand or field; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that monster. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can return 1 of your other banished monsters to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Derk, Longing for the Blue Skies" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck by your opponent's activated monster effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card. When a monster effect is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s) (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 card from your hand or field; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that monster. During the End Phase, if this card is currently banished, and was banished this turn: You can return 1 of your other banished monsters to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Derk, Longing for the Blue Skies" once per turn.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
